reviews.comment:
Estuvimos desayunando y la verdad lo que es el Full un desastre. No había capuchino porque no tenían crema. Éramos 3 y pedimos 6 medialunas y la más tierna tenía 2 o 3 día de cocinada. Un verdadero desastre. Además de no tener variedad de nada el full.
Realmente una porquería. El dueño debería ver a quien pone a cargo de la estación porque debe ser flor de inútil.

(Translated by Google)
We had breakfast, and Full House is a complete disaster. There was no cappuccino because they didn't have cream. There were three of us, and we ordered six croissants, and the tenderest one was two or three days old. A real disaster. Plus, Full House has no variety at all.
Absolutely rubbish. The owner should consider who he puts in charge of the station, because they must be completely useless.
